description: §22.4 E-META-010 — a reference to the reserved `compiler.*` namespace inside a `^{}` block. `compiler.version` is in the reserved-for-future-use `compiler.*` namespace (§22.4); any `compiler.X` reference in a `^{}` block SHALL fire E-META-010. Incidental E-META-EVAL-001 ignored by superset matching.
